# Beudox HR Portal - Technical Context

## Architecture Overview

This is a modern React TypeScript frontend application built with Vite, serving as the user interface for a comprehensive HR management system. It follows a component-based architecture with clear separation of concerns.

### Tech Stack
- **Framework**: React 18 with TypeScript
- **Build System**: Vite for fast development and optimized production builds
- **UI Framework**: shadcn/ui built on Radix UI primitives
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS with custom design tokens
- **Backend Integration**: Supabase (PostgreSQL, Auth, Edge Functions)
- **Routing**: React Router v6 with custom NavLink wrapper
- **State Management**: React hooks and context (no external state libraries)
- **Testing**: Vitest for unit tests, Playwright for E2E tests

## Key Architectural Patterns

### Component Organization
- **Atomic Design**: UI components in `src/components/ui/` follow atomic design principles
- **Feature-based**: Business logic components grouped by domain (attendance, leave, payroll, etc.)
- **Layout Components**: AppLayout provides consistent navigation and structure
- **Custom Hooks**: Reusable logic extracted into custom hooks in `src/hooks/`

### Data Flow
- **Supabase Integration**: Direct database queries using Supabase client
- **Authentication**: Supabase Auth with custom password change flow
- **Real-time**: Potential for real-time subscriptions (not heavily used in current codebase)
- **Edge Functions**: Server-side logic for complex operations like attendance parsing

### File Upload Handling
- **Attendance Upload**: Complex flow with Excel parsing using SheetJS
- **AI Processing**: Supabase Edge Function processes attendance data
- **Batch Operations**: Large datasets handled with chunked database operations

## Key Files and Their Purposes

### Core Application Files
- `src/main.tsx`: Application entry point, renders root component
- `src/App.tsx`: Main app component with routing setup
- `src/pages/Index.tsx`: Root page component

### Layout and Navigation
- `src/components/layout/AppLayout.tsx`: Main layout with sidebar and top bar
- `src/components/layout/AppSidebar.tsx`: Navigation sidebar
- `src/components/layout/TopBar.tsx`: Top navigation bar
- `src/components/layout/NotificationBell.tsx`: Notification dropdown
- `src/components/layout/UserMenu.tsx`: User menu dropdown

### Authentication
- `src/components/MandatoryPasswordChange.tsx`: Initial password setup modal
- `src/hooks/useAuth.ts`: Authentication state management

### Employee Management
- `src/components/employee-profile/`: Tab components for employee profiles
  - `AttendanceTab.tsx`: Employee attendance records
  - `LeaveTab.tsx`: Leave history and balances
  - `PayrollTab.tsx`: Salary and payroll information
  - `SalaryHistoryTab.tsx`: Salary progression
  - `SalaryReviewTab.tsx`: Performance reviews
  - `PendingIncrementCard.tsx`: Increment proposals
  - `ProposeIncrementModal.tsx`: Increment proposal form
  - `ReviewScheduleSection.tsx`: Review scheduling

### Attendance System
- `src/components/attendance/AttendanceUploadFlow.tsx`: Complex attendance upload component
- `src/lib/attendance-format.ts`: Time and working hours formatting utilities

### Leave Management
- `src/components/leave/`: Leave-related components
  - `AllRequestsTab.tsx`: Admin view of all leave requests
  - `ApplyLeaveModal.tsx`: Leave application form
  - `LeaveBalancesTab.tsx`: Employee leave balances
  - `MyRequestsTab.tsx`: Employee's own requests

### Payroll and Finance
- `src/components/payroll/PayrollSummary.tsx`: Payroll calculations
- `src/components/finance/FinanceSummary.tsx`: Financial overviews

### Settings and Configuration
- `src/components/settings/`: System configuration components
  - `CompanyTab.tsx`: Company information
  - `DepartmentsTab.tsx`: Department management
  - `RolesTab.tsx`: Role and permission management
  - `AttendanceTab.tsx`: Attendance settings
  - `LeaveTypesTab.tsx`: Leave type configuration
  - `EvaluationParametersTab.tsx`: Performance parameters
  - `ExpenseCategoriesTab.tsx`: Expense categorization

### Utility Libraries
- `src/lib/utils.ts`: General utility functions (cn for className merging)
- `src/lib/role-access.ts`: Role-based access control functions
- `src/lib/format-date.ts`: Date formatting utilities
- `src/lib/leave-utils.ts`: Leave calculation logic
- `src/lib/review-schedule.ts`: Review scheduling logic
- `src/lib/client-activity.ts`: Activity logging and categorization
- `src/lib/notifications.ts`: Notification system
- `src/lib/login-tracking.ts`: User login tracking

### Integrations
- `src/integrations/supabase/`: Supabase configuration
  - `client.ts`: Supabase client setup
  - `types.ts`: Database type definitions

## Database Schema Insights

Based on the code analysis, the system manages:

### Core Entities
- **employees**: User profiles with auth integration
- **companies**: Multi-tenant company data
- **attendance_records**: Time tracking data
- **leave_requests**: Leave management
- **payroll_records**: Salary and compensation
- **evaluations**: Performance reviews
- **projects**: Project management
- **departments**: Organizational structure
- **roles**: Permission system

### Key Relationships
- Employees belong to companies
- Attendance records link to employees and companies
- Leave requests have approval workflows
- Payroll calculations consider overtime and holidays

## Business Logic Patterns

### Attendance Processing
- Excel file upload with SheetJS parsing
- AI-powered data normalization via Supabase Edge Function
- Automatic calculation of working hours, overtime, and late status
- Batch import with conflict resolution

### Leave Management
- Balance tracking with different leave types
- Approval workflows
- Working day calculations excluding weekends/holidays

### Payroll Calculation
- Base salary + allowances
- Overtime calculations (regular and holiday)
- Tax and deduction handling

### Review Scheduling
- Automated review date calculations
- Status tracking (pending, completed, overdue)

## Security Considerations

- Supabase RLS (Row Level Security) policies assumed
- Role-based UI rendering
- Secure password change flow
- API key management through environment variables

## Performance Optimizations

- Component lazy loading potential
- Efficient database queries with proper indexing assumed
- Chunked bulk operations for large data imports
- Minimal re-renders through proper React patterns

## Development Workflow

- TypeScript for type safety
- ESLint for code quality
- Vitest for fast unit testing
- Playwright for E2E testing
- Supabase CLI for database management

This codebase represents a well-structured, feature-rich HR management system with modern React patterns and comprehensive business logic implementation.
